attempts.agent_commands:
def _IOR_mp(t, n, s): return _IOC_mp(2, t, n, s)
def _IOW_mp(t, n, s): return _IOC_mp(1, t, n, s)
def _IO_mp(t, n): return _IOC_mp(0, t, n, 0)

PP = ord('p')

# sizes
sz_int = 4
sz_uchar = 1
sz_uint = 4
sz_timeval = 16  # struct timeval on 64-bit: two long (8+8)
sz_frob = 2      # struct ppdev_frob_struct: 2 bytes

ioctls = {
    'PPSETMODE':   (_IOW(PP, 0x80, sz_int),   _IOW_mp(PP, 0x80, sz_int)),
    'PPRSTATUS':   (_IOR(PP, 0x81, sz_uchar), _IOR_mp(PP, 0x81, sz_uchar)),
    'PPRCONTROL':  (_IOR(PP, 0x83, sz_uchar), _IOR_mp(PP, 0x83, sz_uchar)),
    'PPWCONTROL':  (_IOW(PP, 0x84, sz_uchar), _IOW_mp(PP, 0x84, sz_uchar)),
    'PPFCONTROL':  (_IOW(PP, 0x8e, sz_frob),  _IOW_mp(PP, 0x8e, sz_frob)),
    'PPRDATA':     (_IOR(PP, 0x85, sz_uchar), _IOR_mp(PP, 0x85, sz_uchar)),
    'PPWDATA':     (_IOW(PP, 0x86, sz_uchar), _IOW_mp(PP, 0x86, sz_uchar)),
    'PPCLAIM':     (_IO(PP, 0x8b),            _IO_mp(PP, 0x8b)),
    'PPRELEASE':   (_IO(PP, 0x8c),            _IO_mp(PP, 0x8c)),
    'PPYIELD':     (_IO(PP, 0x8d),            _IO_mp(PP, 0x8d)),
    'PPEXCL':      (_IO(PP, 0x8f),            _IO_mp(PP, 0x8f)),
    'PPDATADIR':   (_IOW(PP, 0x90, sz_int),   _IOW_mp(PP, 0x90, sz_int)),
    'PPNEGOT':     (_IOW(PP, 0x91, sz_int),   _IOW_mp(PP, 0x91, sz_int)),
    'PPWCTLONIRQ': (_IOW(PP, 0x92, sz_uchar), _IOW_mp(PP, 0x92, sz_uchar)),
    'PPCLRIRQ':    (_IOR(PP, 0x93, sz_int),   _IOR_mp(PP, 0x93, sz_int)),
    'PPSETPHASE':  (_IOW(PP, 0x94, sz_int),   _IOW_mp(PP, 0x94, sz_int)),
    'PPGETTIME':   (_IOR(PP, 0x95, sz_timeval),_IOR_mp(PP, 0x95, sz_timeval)),
    'PPSETTIME':   (_IOW(PP, 0x96, sz_timeval),_IOW_mp(PP, 0x96, sz_timeval)),
    'PPGETMODES':  (_IOR(PP, 0x97, sz_uint),  _IOR_mp(PP, 0x97, sz_uint)),
    'PPGETMODE':   (_IOR(PP, 0x98, sz_int),   _IOR_mp(PP, 0x98, sz_int)),
    'PPGETPHASE':  (_IOR(PP, 0x99, sz_int),   _IOR_mp(PP, 0x99, sz_int)),
    'PPGETFLAGS':  (_IOR(PP, 0x9a, sz_int),   _IOR_mp(PP, 0x9a, sz_int)),
    'PPSETFLAGS':  (_IOW(PP, 0x9b, sz_int),   _IOW_mp(PP, 0x9b, sz_int)),
}

for name, (x86, mp) in sorted(ioctls.items()):
    if x86 == mp:
        print(f'{name} = {x86}')
    else:
        print(f'{name} = {x86}, mips64le:ppc64le:{mp}')
\"
"
/bin/bash -lc "cat > /opt/syzkaller/sys/linux/dev_ppdev.txt << 'EOF'
# Copyright 2024 syzkaller project authors. All rights reserved.
# Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.

# Descriptions for /dev/parport* (ppdev - user-space parallel port driver)
# Kernel config: CONFIG_PPDEV
# Reference: include/uapi/linux/ppdev.h, include/uapi/linux/parport.h

include <linux/ppdev.h>
include <linux/parport.h>

resource fd_ppdev[fd]

syz_open_dev"'$ppdev(dev ptr[in, string["/dev/parport#"]], id intptr, flags flags[open_flags]) fd_ppdev

# No-arg ioctls
ioctl$PPCLAIM(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPCLAIM])
ioctl$PPRELEASE(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPRELEASE])
ioctl$PPYIELD(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPYIELD])
ioctl$PPEXCL(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPEXCL])

# Set IEEE 1284 mode
ioctl$PPSETMODE(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPSETMODE], arg ptr[in, flags[ieee1284_mode, int32]])

# Read/write status register
ioctl$PPRSTATUS(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPRSTATUS], arg ptr[out, int8])

# Read/write control register
ioctl$PPRCONTROL(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPRCONTROL], arg ptr[out, int8])
ioctl$PPWCONTROL(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPWCONTROL], arg ptr[in, flags[parport_control, int8]])

# Frob (mask+val) control register
ioctl$PPFCONTROL(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPFCONTROL], arg ptr[in, ppdev_frob_struct])

# Read/write data register
ioctl$PPRDATA(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPRDATA], arg ptr[out, int8])
ioctl$PPWDATA(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPWDATA], arg ptr[in, int8])

# Data line direction (0=output, non-zero=input)
ioctl$PPDATADIR(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPDATADIR], arg ptr[in, int32])

# Negotiate IEEE 1284 mode
ioctl$PPNEGOT(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPNEGOT], arg ptr[in, flags[ieee1284_mode, int32]])

# Set control lines on interrupt
ioctl$PPWCTLONIRQ(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPWCTLONIRQ], arg ptr[in, flags[parport_control, int8]])

# Clear and return interrupt count
ioctl$PPCLRIRQ(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPCLRIRQ], arg ptr[out, int32])

# Set IEEE 1284 phase
ioctl$PPSETPHASE(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPSETPHASE], arg ptr[in, flags[ieee1284_phase, int32]])

# Get/set port timeout
ioctl$PPGETTIME(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPGETTIME], arg ptr[out, timeval])
ioctl$PPSETTIME(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPSETTIME], arg ptr[in, timeval])

# Get available hardware modes
ioctl$PPGETMODES(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPGETMODES], arg ptr[out, int32])

# Get current mode and phase
ioctl$PPGETMODE(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPGETMODE], arg ptr[out, int32])
ioctl$PPGETPHASE(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPGETPHASE], arg ptr[out, int32])

# Get/set ppdev flags
ioctl$PPGETFLAGS(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPGETFLAGS], arg ptr[out, int32])
ioctl$PPSETFLAGS(fd fd_ppdev, cmd const[PPSETFLAGS], arg ptr[in, flags[ppdev_flags, int32]])

# Structs

ppdev_frob_struct {
	mask	int8
	val	int8
}

timeval {
	tv_sec	int64
	tv_usec	int64
}

# IEEE 1284 modes (from linux/parport.h)
ieee1284_mode = IEEE1284_MODE_NIBBLE, IEEE1284_MODE_BYTE, IEEE1284_MODE_COMPAT, IEEE1284_MODE_BECP, IEEE1284_MODE_ECP, IEEE1284_MODE_ECPRLE, IEEE1284_MODE_ECPSWE, IEEE1284_MODE_EPP, IEEE1284_MODE_EPPSL, IEEE1284_MODE_EPPSWE, IEEE1284_DEVICEID, IEEE1284_EXT_LINK, IEEE1284_ADDR, IEEE1284_DATA

# IEEE 1284 phases
ieee1284_phase = IEEE1284_PH_FWD_IDLE, IEEE1284_PH_FWD_DATA, IEEE1284_PH_HBUSY_DNA, IEEE1284_PH_FWD_UNKNOWN, IEEE1284_PH_REV_IDLE, IEEE1284_PH_HBUSY_DAVAIL, IEEE1284_PH_REV_DATA, IEEE1284_PH_REV_UNKNOWN, IEEE1284_PH_ECP_SETUP, IEEE1284_PH_ECP_FWD_TO_REV, IEEE1284_PH_ECP_REV_IDLE, IEEE1284_PH_ECP_REV_TO_FWD, IEEE1284_PH_ECP_DIR_UNKNOWN

# Parallel port control register bits
parport_control = PARPORT_CONTROL_STROBE, PARPORT_CONTROL_AUTOFD, PARPORT_CONTROL_INIT, PARPORT_CONTROL_SELECT

# ppdev user-visible flags
ppdev_flags = PP_FASTWRITE, PP_FASTREAD, PP_W91284PIC
EOF'
/bin/bash -lc "cat > /opt/syzkaller/sys/linux/dev_ppdev.txt.const << 'EOF'

cd /opt/syzkaller && make descriptions 2>&1
grep -n "timeval" /opt/syzkaller/sys/linux/sys.txt | head -20
sed -n '872,876p' /opt/syzkaller/sys/linux/sys.txt
cd /opt/syzkaller && sed -i '/"'^timeval {/,/''^}/d'"' sys/linux/dev_ppdev.txt && grep -n \"timeval\" sys/linux/dev_ppdev.txt
cd /opt/syzkaller && make all TARGETOS=linux TARGETARCH=amd64 2>&1
echo "=== dev_ppdev.txt ===" && cat /opt/syzkaller/sys/linux/dev_ppdev.txt && echo "=== dev_ppdev.txt.const ===" && cat /opt/syzkaller/sys/linux/dev_ppdev.txt.const
